title: helicteres elliptica
intro: Helicteres elliptica, also known as the elliptical helicteres or elliptical heliotrope, is a plant species belonging to the family Malpighiaceae, native to tropical Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Helicteres elliptica include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and reduce blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Helicteres elliptica include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used to create teas, tonics, and supplements for medicinal purposes.
